text.title: Trunk-Based Dev Principles Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the TBD-readiness checklist artefact. Scores each of the four principles with per-check evidence and emits an aggregate verdict.

section.title: JSON Schema (draft-07)

example.note: artefact_id missing tbd- prefix; principles.single_trunk.score=30 exceeds max 25; missing 3 of 4 principles; verdict=adopt with total=30 is impossible (threshold >= 70); version not semver; last_reviewed not ISO date.

antipattern.reason: Aggregate-pass on one weak pillar will collapse in production.

antipattern.description: fast_ci.evidence omits p50 or p95 numbers.
antipattern.reason: Single-point CI duration claims hide tail latency; r4 requires sub-10-min feedback for the bulk of runs.
"Releasable trunk" without flag plumbing means broken work blocks every release; r3 violation.
